## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile news.py install` passes
- [ ] No API keys or secrets added anywhere
- [ ] Still **stdlib-only** (no new dependencies)
- [ ] Anything installed is removable via `./install --uninstall`
- [ ] New feeds are **primary/official** sources; new concepts pass the teeth test
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / NOTICE)
